_comment: Last-resort fallback for selectors not covered by an ERC-7730 descriptor. Wallet renders these as 'signature-only' — argument types and labels are correct but there's no human-readable intent or token metadata. Keep entries small and well-known; this is not a full 4byte mirror.

ERC-721 + ERC-1155.0xf242432a: safeTransferFrom(address from,address to,uint256 id,uint256 amount,bytes data)
ERC-721 + ERC-1155.0x2eb2c2d6: safeBatchTransferFrom(address from,address to,uint256[] ids,uint256[] amounts,bytes data)

Aave V3 Pool.0xa415bcad: borrow(address asset,uint256 amount,uint256 interestRateMode,uint16 referralCode,address onBehalfOf)

Uniswap V2 Router.0x38ed1739: swapExactTokensForTokens(uint256 amountIn,uint256 amountOutMin,address[] path,address to,uint256 deadline)
Uniswap V2 Router.0x18cbafe5: swapExactTokensForETH(uint256 amountIn,uint256 amountOutMin,address[] path,address to,uint256 deadline)

ENS.0xf7a16963: registerWithConfig(string name,address owner,uint256 duration,bytes32 secret,address resolver,address addr)
